item.title: backlog list flags items with unmet dependsOn dependencies
item.intent: backlog list must visually surface dependency blockers so users can see at a glance which items cannot be picked yet — invisible blockers cause wasted grooming and sprint failures.
item.description: backlog list currently shows items with status, priority, and readyForSprint but gives no signal that an item has unresolved dependsOn constraints. A user looking at the list cannot tell which items are blocked versus which are truly ready. The fix is to add a visual marker in the list output when an item has one or more dependsOn entries whose items are not status: done. The marker should be minimal (e.g., a [blocked] tag or a ✗ in a deps column) and only appear when blockers exist.
acceptanceCriteria: backlog list shows a visual indicator next to items whose dependsOn items are not all status: done
backlog list shows no indicator for items with no dependsOn, or when all dependencies are done
The indicator includes a count or list of blocking IDs so the user can investigate
